report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides: AI Agent Frameworks Comparison 2026 (Eliza vs Virtuals vs Rig vs ZerePy) and RWA Tokenization Platforms Comparison 2026 (Ondo vs Centrifuge vs Maple vs Goldfinch). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Audited 535+ existing published pages to identify content gaps — found AI agent framework comparisons and RWA platform reviews missing

AI Agent Frameworks: Eliza (~60% market share, TypeScript), Virtuals/GAME (~20%, Base ecosystem), Rig (~15%, Rust/Solana), ZerePy (~5%, Python/creative), Autonolas (co-owned AI). Total market ~$1.7B, projected $20B+

RWA Platforms: Total on-chain RWA crossed $12B in March 2026. Private credit grew 180% YoY. Ondo ($1.4B AUM, 4.8% Treasury yields), Centrifuge ($1.1B loans, 8-12% yields), Maple ($780M institutional credit), Goldfinch (emerging market DeFi lending)
Cross-referenced existing content: confirmed no overlap with existing AI agent guides (payments, wallets, identity) or RWA guide (general tokenization)
Sources: Gate.io research, The Block, Bankless, BeInCrypto, CoinGape, BlockchainAppFactory, RWA.io, Blocklr

sections.title: Content Created
items: AI Agent Frameworks Comparison 2026 (~3,100 words): covers Eliza, Virtuals/GAME, Rig, ZerePy, Autonolas with deep dives, comparison table, decision framework, risks section, 6 FAQs
RWA Platforms Comparison 2026 (~3,200 words): covers Ondo Finance, Centrifuge, Maple Finance, Goldfinch with deep dives, comparison table, platform selection guide, risks section, 6 FAQs

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: AI Agents page: title 'AI Crypto Agent Frameworks Comparison 2026: Eliza vs Virtuals vs Rig vs ZerePy', target keywords: AI agent frameworks, Eliza, Virtuals Protocol, Rig, ZerePy, agent framework comparison. ArticleSchema + FAQSchema (6 questions). Internal links to /learn/ai-agent-payments-x402-guide, /learn/ai-agent-wallets-autonomous-payments-guide-2026, /learn/ai-agent-identity-nhi-guide, /ecosystem/virtuals-protocol

RWA page: title 'RWA Platforms Comparison 2026: Ondo vs Centrifuge vs Maple vs Goldfinch | degen0x', target keywords: RWA, real world assets, tokenization, Ondo Finance, Centrifuge, Maple Finance, Goldfinch. ArticleSchema + FAQSchema (6 questions). Internal links to /learn/rwa-tokenization-guide-2026, /learn/tokenized-funds-institutional-defi-guide, /learn/yield-bearing-stablecoins, /defi-lending/best/stablecoin-yield
Both pages: Full OG + Twitter cards, breadcrumb navigation, structured data schemas, 2026 freshness signals

sections.title: Interactive Components
items: No interactive components needed — both pages are static educational content (comparison tables, deep dives, FAQs) optimal for SEO crawling
